# INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.continueInApp

**Case**

The system should launch the app in the foreground to play the media.

## Declaration

```swift
case continueInApp
```

## Discussion

Because the lifespan of an app extension is short, media playback should happen in your app, not in the Intents app extension. To play the media with your app in the foreground, return [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode/continueInApp] as the response [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INPlayMediaIntentResponse/code].



## Intents App Extensions

- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.ready**: The intents handler is ready to handle the intent.
- **INPlayMediaIntentResponseCode.handleInApp**: The system should launch the app in the background to play the media.
